constraints.title: ledger-as-truth + fold-on-read
constraints.rationale: 记忆状态靠 fold 重建永不 mutate；drop 是墓碑不删历史

constraints.title: model-free compaction render
constraints.rationale: compaction 时只 fold+render 不调模型；semantic work 前置 turn_end

constraints.title: model proposes / code disposes (tool-schema-only + provenance rejection + content-hash dedup)
coverage-tier pruning safety signal (none/partial/strong, lexicographic drop priority)
constraints.rationale: 确定性可审计，coverage-first 保证语义安全

constraints.title: watermark vs provenance separation (coversUpToId vs sourceEntryIds/supportingObservationIds)
constraints.rationale: 事件溯源正解，避免进度耦合因果

constraints.title: exact-id recall not search
constraints.rationale: 防止 recall 滥用，保持工具廉价

constraints.title: pool budget values (max/target tokens)
constraints.rationale: 双轨分离设计保留，具体值可调

constraints.title: three-agent split granularity
constraints.rationale: observer/reflector/dropper 分离 vs 合并视复杂度

terminology.definition: timestamped session event with provenance (sourceEntryIds) + relevance tier
durable conclusion distilled from observations with supportingObservationIds (coverage evidence)
tombstone removing an observation id from active memory (not from ledger history)
branch-local append-only custom entries (om.observations.recorded / om.reflections.recorded / om.observations.dropped); source of truth
progress/projection watermark — NOT provenance; drives token-clock accounting + projection boundaries
none/partial/strong = 0/1/≥2 reflections citing an observation; deterministic pruning safety signal
reducer reconstructing memory state from append-only entries (first-valid-record-wins + drop tombstones)
boundary-gated fold: visible (latest om.folded), full (branch tip), compaction (cut-boundary), diff (visible-vs-full)
compaction mode folding observations+reflections+drops through boundary; triggered when pool≥observationsPoolMaxTokens
exact-id (12-hex) reverse lookup recovering source entries behind compacted memory; not semantic search

non_goals.title: V2→V3 migration logic
non_goals.rationale: 本项目不向后兼容；pi-maestro-flow 无遗留格式则不需

non_goals.title: Pi SDK-specific hook registration
non_goals.rationale: 绑定 Pi 事件系统，移植需适配目标 runtime 钩子

non_goals.title: dropper historical coverage repair
non_goals.rationale: 本项目未实现（concepts.md:81）；需更强保证可后续加周期性审计

non_goals.title: reflection quality scoring (LLM/embeddings)
non_goals.rationale: 本项目用 prompt 约束+id 校验；显式质量分可后续加（ANL-001 也 deferred semantic importance scoring）

non_goals.title: incremental fold/caching optimization
non_goals.rationale: foldLedger 全量 O(entries)；超长会话可后续优化（仅 visibleProjection 免重折叠）

insights.summary: ledger-as-truth + fold-on-read + model-free compaction render 是核心可借鉴模式——把昂贵 semantic work 前置，crisis 时刻只 render
model 提案/code 裁决边界（tool-schema-only + provenance 拒收 + content-hash 去重）使系统 correct-by-construction
coverage-tier (none/partial/strong) 作为 pruning safety 结构信号是本项目最创新贡献；词典序优先级优于加权评分
与 ANL-001 pi-ultra-compact 互补（会话语义 vs 素材体积），可叠加；与标准 compaction 相比直击双痛点
model 信任边界严密（provenance 伪造抵抗）；残留=语义保真度不可机器验证（coverage 是结构代理非语义保证）
投影不对称+visibleProjection amortize 折叠成本；token 估算偏粗但自校正；长程 coverage 漂移是已知限制

open_questions.question: 是否需要比 upstream 更强的语义保真度保证？
options: 沿用 prompt+id 校验（接受残留风险）
加周期性 coverage 审计/修复

open_questions.question: observations ledger 与 .workflow/ 工件级记忆如何分层集成？
options: observations=会话内自动捕获 / .workflow/=跨会话显式
observations 仅作 compaction 渲染素材不持久化
